queries.compiledQueryString:
select 
  lead_tier,
  count(*) as volume
from (select * from leadgenius.mart_scored_leads)
group by 1
order by 
  case when lead_tier = 'Hot' then 1 
       when lead_tier = 'Warm' then 2 
       else 3 end
queries.inputQueryString:
select 
  lead_tier,
  count(*) as volume
from ${leads}
group by 1
order by 
  case when lead_tier = 'Hot' then 1 
       when lead_tier = 'Warm' then 2 
       else 3 end

queries.compiledQueryString:
select 
  cast(lead_score / 10 as int) * 10 as score_bucket,
  count(*) as volume
from (select * from leadgenius.mart_scored_leads)
group by 1
order by 1
queries.inputQueryString:
select 
  cast(lead_score / 10 as int) * 10 as score_bucket,
  count(*) as volume
from ${leads}
group by 1
order by 1

queries.compiledQueryString:
select
  count(case when industry is not null then 1 end) * 100.0 / nullif(count(*), 0) as industry_fill_rate,
  count(case when is_b2b then 1 end) * 100.0 / nullif(count(*), 0) as b2b_fill_rate
from (select * from leadgenius.mart_scored_leads)
queries.inputQueryString:
select
  count(case when industry is not null then 1 end) * 100.0 / nullif(count(*), 0) as industry_fill_rate,
  count(case when is_b2b then 1 end) * 100.0 / nullif(count(*), 0) as b2b_fill_rate
from ${leads}

queries.compiledQueryString:
select lead_name, company_name, job_title, email, lead_score
from (select * from leadgenius.mart_scored_leads)
where lead_tier = 'Hot'
order by lead_score desc
limit 10
queries.inputQueryString:
select lead_name, company_name, job_title, email, lead_score
from ${leads}
where lead_tier = 'Hot'
order by lead_score desc
limit 10
